products.name: Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
products.what_it_does: Make prototypes, slides & one-pagers by talking to Claude
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion page / maker profile @Rohan Chaubey
products.potential_budget: Medium-High (Anthropic is well-funded; potential API partnership or co-marketing)
products.opportunity_notes: Claude Design is a new Anthropic product. Likely needs developer ecosystem growth, integrations with design/dev tools, and user onboarding content.

products.name: GPT-Rosalind
products.what_it_does: Purpose-built model for scientific research & drug discovery
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / OpenAI developer relations
products.potential_budget: High (OpenAI has massive budget; could be enterprise partnership opportunity)
products.opportunity_notes: Specialized domain model - biotech/pharma integration partners would be valuable. Academic partnerships, drug discovery pipeline integrations.

products.name: Android CLI
products.what_it_does: Build high quality Android apps 3x faster using any agent
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / GitHub if linked
products.opportunity_notes: Individual maker building dev tooling. Likely needs developer advocacy, documentation help, and community. Great for guest blog/tutorial opportunities.

products.name: Grok Voice API
products.what_it_does: Fast, accurate STT and TTS APIs at the best price
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Zac Zuo
products.opportunity_notes: Voice API from x.ai - direct competitor to ElevenLabs, Deepgram, OpenAI TTS. Needs developers to build integrations, sample apps, and use-case content.

products.name: Vercel Flags
products.what_it_does: Feature flags, targeting rules, rollouts. All from Vercel.
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / Vercel community forum
products.opportunity_notes: Vercel's entry into feature flags. Already has massive user base. Community content, migration guides from competitors could be valuable.

products.name: Codex 2.0 by OpenAI
products.what_it_does: Codex now runs apps, automates tasks, codes & more
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / OpenAI developer forum
products.opportunity_notes: Major OpenAI product update. Codex agent capabilities expanded. Developer ecosystem partners, coding tool integrations, use-case content.

products.name: Hipocampus
products.what_it_does: AI operators that own team workflows
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Noureddin Bakir
products.opportunity_notes: AI workflow automation. Would benefit from integration partnerships, workflow template creators, and early adopter testimonials.

products.name: React Email 6.0 by Resend
products.what_it_does: Build, customize, and ship emails — all from your own app
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Adithya Shreshti / Resend community
products.opportunity_notes: Major version release from Resend (email API platform). Popular open-source-adjacent tool. Template contributors, tutorial content, integration with React frameworks.

products.name: Is Your Site Agent-Ready? by Cloudflare
products.what_it_does: Scan your website to see how ready it is for AI agents.
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / Cloudflare community / developer docs
products.opportunity_notes: Cloudflare's AI agent readiness tool. Very new category - could benefit from blog posts explaining what makes a site agent-ready, integration guides.

products.name: Cerberus
products.what_it_does: Cursor for AI hacking that can't go out of scope
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Aziz Akhmedkhodjaev
products.opportunity_notes: AI coding tool that promises scope stability. Interesting differentiator from Cursor. Early-stage - needs testers, feedback, use-case documentation.

products.name: Sharpsana
products.what_it_does: The AI agent that runs your entire startup
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Assylkhan Sarsenbayev
products.opportunity_notes: Full-stack AI startup agent. Very ambitious claim. Early-stage startup likely seeking early adopters and integration partners.

products.name: CalendarPipe
products.what_it_does: Programmable calendar sync for humans and AI agents
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Jakub Beneš
products.opportunity_notes: Calendar API for both humans and AI agents. Interesting niche - AI agent workflow integrations (n8n, Make, Zapier), calendar app partnerships.

products.name: Arky
products.what_it_does: The canvas for thinking with AI
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Minseo Kim
products.opportunity_notes: AI thinking canvas. Similar to tools like Mem, Notion AI. Needs differentiation content, template creators, early adopter testimonials.

products.name: Melo
products.what_it_does: One canvas for all your work
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Hamza Al Sorkhy
products.opportunity_notes: All-in-one workspace canvas. Competing with Notion, Craft, Obsidian. Needs unique differentiation content and early testimonials.

products.name: Notebooks in Gemini
products.what_it_does: Keep every project, chat, and file in one focused space
products.opportunity_notes: Google's new Gemini feature. Needs developer integrations, use-case demos, and content explaining the workspace feature. Enterprise adoption.

products.name: Prio
products.what_it_does: Your AI chief of staff for email, calendar, tasks and more
products.opportunity_notes: AI chief of staff - similar to Motion, Clockwise, x.ai. Early-stage needs users, testimonials, and integration partners.

products.name: .MD This Page
products.what_it_does: Convert any page to clean Markdown instantly
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Adem Kouki
products.opportunity_notes: Browser extension utility. Simple but useful. Maker likely needs browser store reviews, content creators demonstrating use cases.

products.name: Lounge
products.what_it_does: macOS Tahoe menu bar manager with notch-aware icon control
products.opportunity_notes: macOS menu bar utility. Niche but specific use case (macOS Tahoe compatibility). App Store presence and Mac community engagement.

products.name: CapyPlan
products.what_it_does: Your no stress chearleader for tiny tasks
products.how_to_contact: Product Hunt discussion / maker profile @Summer Liu
products.opportunity_notes: Gentle productivity app. Needs content marketing, productivity blogger partnerships, early testimonials. Friendly for micro-SaaS collaborations.

top_targets_by_budget.opportunity: API partnerships, developer ecosystem content, biotech integrations for GPT-Rosalind

notes: Data scraped from Product Hunt Atom feed on 2026-04-19. All times are PST/UTC-7 as reported by Product Hunt. Some April 12-13 products may not appear in current feed (possibly pushed off by newer products). Contact info is based on Product Hunt discussion pages and maker profiles - direct outreach should be done through those channels. Big tech products (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, Vercel, Cloudflare, x.ai) likely have formal partnership programs and should be approached through official channels rather than individual maker outreach.
